=== Logits top-k Auslöschung (405B logits dataset) ===

Dataset: arcee-ai/LLama-405B-Logits
Embeddings: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct (L2-normalized rows for cosines)
top_k: 10, rows scanned: 200, valid timesteps: 298871

Definitions:
  cos_ij = cosine(embed(token_i), embed(token_j)) on top-k candidates.
  w = softmax(logits | top-k), Σ w = 1.
  weighted_pairwise_ausloeschung = (1 - ||Σ_i w_i ê_i||²) / (1 - Σ_i w_i²) = E_{i≠j}[1 - cos_ij],  i,j i.i.d. ~ w.  (Can exceed 1.)
  soft_sum_ausloeschung = 1 - ||Σ_i w_i ê_i||  (cancellation of the soft mixture; in [0,1] for unit ê_i).

weighted_pairwise: mean=0.946272 std=0.099928 min=0.000000 max=2.000000
soft_sum:          mean=0.068099 std=0.136051 min=0.000000 max=0.642087

--- Big picture: 10 groups (equal-width bins on [0, 2.0] for weighted_pairwise) ---
bin_range          count    relative_freq
[0.00, 0.20)             9    0.0030%
[0.20, 0.40)            39    0.0130%
[0.40, 0.60)          4278    1.4314%
[0.60, 0.80)         21123    7.0676%
[0.80, 1.00)        224209    75.0187%
[1.00, 1.20)         47956    16.0457%
[1.20, 1.40)           679    0.2272%
[1.40, 1.60)           576    0.1927%
[1.60, 1.80)             0    0.0000%
[1.80, 2.00]             2    0.0007%

total timesteps in histogram: 298871

--- Example cosine matrices (first valid timesteps) ---
